title: Comrade pack, 1st chechen war / soviet afghan war based pack
description: 2000+ downloads on curseforge, It adds Soviet gun like AKMS (a.k.a AK-47/AKM) or Makarov PM, soviet tools, vodka, rubles, canister and more
body: [NO OPTIFNE REQUIRED] a lot of resource packs with guns are mainly base off world war 1, world war 2 , wild west, video games so i make one based around soviet afghan war (1979-1989) and first chechen war (1994-1996). the items it adds are: AKMS (a.k.a ak-47/akm), makarov PM, ice axe, fire axe, ZiK axe, crowbar, hammer, sickle, manure fork, kitchen knife, 6h4 AKM type ll bayonet,6h5 bayonet, golden 6h4 bayonet, MPL-50 shovel, tonfa (a.k.a police baton), gas pipe, canisters, chicken tushonka, beef tushonka, empty can, AI-2 medical kit, bread ''brick'', 7.62x39mm & 9x18mm ammuntion box, soviet rubles and lighter. it have custom polish, english and russian lang
